summary: Completed testing of Chat Widget ('Converse com nossos especialistas') and Meus Pets features. Fixed critical bug in server.py where user['id'] was missing (KeyError). All 19 backend tests passed, all frontend features working correctly.

fixed.issue: KeyError: 'id' - get_current_user() returned user['_id'] but code expected user['id']
fixed.fix: Added user['id'] = user['_id'] alias in get_current_user() function (line 75 of server.py)
fixed.priority: CRITICAL - was blocking all pets and chat history endpoints

passed_tests: Chat FAB button visible on homepage (data-testid='chat-fab')
Chat FAB shows 'Fale com Especialista' text
Clicking chat FAB opens chat panel
Chat panel title is 'Nossos Especialistas' (NOT mentioning AI)
Chat responds to therapy questions (acupuntura, homeopatia, CBD)
Chat responds to symptom questions (dor, ansiedade, pelagem)
Chat panel shows 'Faça login para salvar histórico' when not logged in
Chat close button works
POST /api/chat returns response for therapy questions
POST /api/chat returns response for general questions
POST /api/chat with pet_id returns personalized response
My Pets page (/meus-pets) loads for logged-in users
My Pets page redirects to /login if not authenticated
POST /api/pets creates a new pet (cao, gato, outro species)
GET /api/pets returns user's pets
PUT /api/pets/{id} updates a pet
DELETE /api/pets/{id} removes a pet
GET /api/chat/history returns chat history for logged-in user
Sidebar menu shows 'Meus Pets' link for logged-in users
Sidebar navigation to /meus-pets works
seed_data_creation: Test pets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat Widget and Meus Pets features fully tested. Chat uses RULE-BASED responses (not AI) - matches keywords to THERAPY_KNOWLEDGE dictionary. AI integration to be added later. The chat works for both logged-in and anonymous users, but history is only saved for logged-in users. Pet selection in chat allows personalized responses based on pet's species, breed, age, weight, and conditions.

mocked_apis.Chat_specialist: Rule-based (THERAPY_KNOWLEDGE dictionary in server.py) - NOT AI

features: Opens chat panel with 'Nossos Especialistas' title
Chat history saved for logged-in users
Fields: name, species, breed, age (years/months), weight, conditions, notes

bug_fixed.root_cause: The get_current_user() function converted MongoDB _id to string and stored it as user['_id'], but the pets and chat endpoints were accessing user['id'] which didn't exist
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added user['id'] = user['_id'] alias in get_current_user() function at line 75 of server.py
bug_fixed.verification: All 19 backend tests pass, frontend CRUD operations work correctly
